title: Reporting a complaint for the Assisted Human Reproduction Act - Canada.ca
content:
## Reporting a complaint for the Assisted Human Reproduction Act
Health Canada is committed to verifying complaints from Canadians (e.g., donors, surrogates, intended parents, children born of assisted human reproduction (AHR), healthcare professionals, and clinics) and industry regarding materials, activities or any matters which are subject to the Assisted Human Reproduction Act (the AHR Act) or its Regulations.
To submit a complaint please complete the Complaint form for the Assisted Human Reproduction Act
Please review the information before you submit it and be sure to complete the consent sections within the form in order for Health Canada to take action on your complaint.
All complaints are prioritized according to the health and safety risk with high-risk complaints receiving priority attention.
